## チェックリスト（必須）

- [ ] task_updated
- [ ] task_order_checked
- [ ] issue_created_and_linked
- [ ] issue_split_for_parallelizable_units
- [ ] issue_closed_on_task_done
- [ ] branch_naming_checked
- [ ] tests_run_lint
- [ ] tests_run_vitest
- [ ] tests_run_e2e_or_na
- [ ] ci_green_confirmed
- [ ] self_review_done
- [ ] ready_for_main_merge
